author: y4rr
content: Decision: For logit parity, use tiny model variants (MobileNetV2 with num_classes=4, 8x8 input, 2 inverted-residual stages) rather than full ImageNet scale. Rationale: (1) full MobileNetV2 has ~3.4M params — storing as JSON would be >40MB; (2) tiny variants still exercise the same forward-pass math (conv, relu, residual add, adaptive pool, linear); (3) approach matches ferrotorch-llama's tiny-config pattern. Fixture stores: weights dict (named params) + input tensor + expected output from torch.manual_seed(42).
